context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the create-engine instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the task is to create, scaffold, or refactor a Rails engine.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: A good engine has a narrow purpose, a clear host-app integration story, and a small public API. Keep this skill focused on structure and design. Use adjacent skills for installer details, deep test coverage, release workflow, or documentation work.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Dummy app exists: `ls spec/dummy` or `ls test/dummy` should return the app directory.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Create the minimal engine structure. **Checkpoint:** `bundle exec rake` inside the engine must pass.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use a structure close to this:

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **What the host app must add:** mount route, initializer, migrations, credentials, background jobs, or assets.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Prefer one explicit configuration surface, for example:

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Do not scatter configuration across unrelated constants and initializers.
